I found the remaining gaps: cards only showed the “Drafting” text pill, and detail still rendered the placeholder markdown/editor while drafting. I’m adding exported renderer components for the run-status pill and draft-loading state so the behavior is testable without mounting the full Electron app.
The UI components and tests are in place. I’m running typecheck now; if the conditional detail rendering has any JSX or type issue, this will catch it before the full suite.
Typecheck passed. I’m running the full suite again because the test runner entrypoint and renderer tests changed.

Implemented the review follow-up.

**Summary of Changes**
- Added an active spinner inside drafting ticket run-status pills, so Todo placeholders visibly show drafting activity.
- Added a dedicated ticket-detail loading panel for `runStatus: drafting`.
- Hid placeholder markdown/editor content while drafting is still running.
- Kept run activity visible so users can still inspect draft run logs while waiting.
- Added renderer tests for the drafting spinner and detail loading state.

**Files Changed**
- [App.tsx](/Users/robertpitt/Projects/relay/src/renderer/src/App.tsx)
- [styles.css](/Users/robertpitt/Projects/relay/src/renderer/src/styles.css)
- [ticket-draft-ui.test.tsx](/Users/robertpitt/Projects/relay/tests/ticket-draft-ui.test.tsx)
- [run-tests.mjs](/Users/robertpitt/Projects/relay/tests/run-tests.mjs)

Also still includes the prior async draft lifecycle changes in shared/main/test files from the earlier pass. Existing `.relay/` and `.effect/` dirty files remain present and were not intentionally edited.

**Commands Run**
- `grep` / `sed` for inspection
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm test`
- `git status --short`
- `git diff --stat`

**Tests**
- `npm run typecheck`: passed
- `npm test`: passed, 71/71 tests

**Remaining Risks**
- No manual Electron UI smoke test was run; verification is through typecheck and automated renderer/service tests.
